site.name: Nirbhay Knitting Industries Pvt. Ltd.
site.metaDescription: Nirbhay Knitting Industries — Engineered technical textiles for coating, lamination & performance applications. 40 years of precision, consistency, and sustainable innovation.

heroVariantB.title: Engineered Technical Textiles for Coating, Lamination & Performance
heroVariantB.subtitle: Consistent substrates. Predictable performance.
heroVariantB.description: Founded by Late Mr. Rohit D. Kamdar, NKI started off as a company offering high quality polyester fabrics for the synthetic leather industry. Under the leadership of our CMD, Mr. Rajeev Kamdar, the company has expanded across horizons — never compromising on Quality and Sustainability. Today, we are proud to say that we are a certified ZERO DISCHARGE COMPANY.

showcase.title: A material and coatings partner with practical manufacturing depth
showcase.description: Nirbhay connects substrate development, coating support, quality validation, and responsive manufacturing into an integrated industrial platform.

cards.title: FR Fabrics — From impossible to reality
cards.description: As the saying goes, it always seems impossible until it's done and that is exactly what happened with us. With incessant work and round the clock efforts of our technical team, we now manufacture standard FR fabrics.

cards.title: Technically advanced products for a diverse clientele
cards.description: Our range of fabrics combined with our range of chemicals, puts us in a unique position to offer the most technically advance products (or product combinations) to our diverse clientele.

cards.title: Process control and in-house testing for customer-specific requirements
cards.description: The Halol facility combines production, validation, and responsive development to reduce risk and shorten the path from sample to supply.

cards.title: Cleaner process choices supporting future-ready material development
cards.description: Zero discharge operations, water-free finishing, recycled yarn options, and lower-footprint product development shape the company's next phase.

process.title: A development workflow built around technical clarity and manufacturing follow-through
process.description: Each project starts with application needs and ends with a tested, reliable solution — whether the requirement is a knitted base fabric, a coated surface, or a new laminated construction.

steps.title: Understand the application
steps.description: We begin with end-use conditions, performance expectations, coating compatibility, and customization needs before recommending a fabric or material route.

steps.title: Develop the right substrate and finish
steps.description: Our teams match knit structure, surface treatment, lamination, or PU systems to the requirement, building practical samples for evaluation.

steps.title: Validate, scale, and support
steps.description: In-house testing, disciplined production control, and responsive commercial support help move successful developments toward repeatable supply.

spotlight.title: Full in-house production, coating expertise, and sustainability discipline
spotlight.description: Nirbhay's strength comes from connecting fabric expertise with coating knowledge, process control, responsive delivery, and customization — built on trust, transparency, and technical excellence.

panels.title: Knitted material platform
panels.description: Base fabrics, 3D spacer constructions, raised fabrics, recycled yarn developments, and FR fabrics designed around end-use performance.

panels.title: Chemical trading and support
panels.description: Certified agents for Interplast Kimya. Solvent based, water based and bio based chemicals for synthetic leather, genuine leather, and direct coating.

panels.title: Responsible process direction
panels.description: Zero discharge, water-free finishing, efficient utilities, and lower-footprint product development support future-facing customer expectations.

finalCta.title: Ready to develop a material program with us?
finalCta.description: Talk to our team about knitted substrates, coated textiles, PU coating, laminating, recycled yarn options, FR developments, or contract manufacturing for your next project.

banner.title: NK
banner.subtitle: All fabrics without the use of water.

journeySection.title: How Nirbhay Is Evolving
journeySection.storyTitle: Engineering precision with sustainable innovation for over 40 years
paragraphs: NKI started off as a company offering high quality polyester fabrics for the synthetic leather industry. Founded by Late Mr. Rohit D. Kamdar, the company quickly established itself as a trusted name in the industry.

After the sudden demise of our founder, the baton was handed over to a confident young man, his son and our current CMD, Mr. Rajeev Kamdar. Under his leadership, the company has expanded across horizons.
Two things Mr. Kamdar has never compromised on are Quality and Sustainability. And today, we are proud to say that we are a certified ZERO DISCHARGE COMPANY.

In 2020, as part of our portfolio diversification plan, we expanded into trading of Chemicals, under the brand, NirChem. NirChem deals in all kinds of chemicals needed, across various industries ranging from synthetic leather to direct coating.

milestones.title: Knitted fabrics and coated textile support
milestones.description: Core manufacturing centered on knitted fabrics, vinyl coating support, and industrial application know-how.

milestones.title: In-house testing capability
milestones.description: Quality control and customer-specific validation became central to the company's operating model.

milestones.title: NirChem brand launched
milestones.description: As part of our portfolio diversification plan, we expanded into trading of Chemicals, under the brand, NirChem.

milestones.title: Interplast Kimya represented
milestones.description: Became certified agents for Interplast Kimya, based out of Istanbul Turkey, specialising in chemicals for different types of coating.

milestones.title: New fabric categories launched
milestones.description: 3D spacer fabrics, raised fabrics, and recycled-yarn developments broadened the offer.

milestones.title: FR fabrics and innovation pipeline expands
milestones.description: As the saying goes, it always seems impossible until it's done. With incessant work and round the clock efforts of our technical team, we now manufacture standard FR fabrics.

story.title: Built for industrial performance, positioned for international growth
paragraphs: Having been in the industry for over 40 years, we have mastered the art of offering fabrics engineered to be highly technical while having the best handfeel achievable. Our portfolio spans knitted base fabrics, 3D spacer fabrics, raised fabrics, recycled yarn fabrics, vinyl coated textiles, and FR fabrics — all manufactured without the use of water.

In 2020, as part of our portfolio diversification plan, we expanded into trading of Chemicals, under the brand, NirChem. NirChem deals in all kinds of chemicals needed, across various industries ranging from synthetic leather to direct coating.

factoryGallery.title: Inside the Halol Manufacturing Unit
factoryGallery.subtitle: 35,000+ sq. ft. of integrated knitting, coating, and testing infrastructure

strengths.title: Full In-House Production & Testing
strengths.description: Complete quality control, flexibility, and customer-specific validation under one roof.

strengths.title: 125 MT Monthly Capacity
strengths.description: Reliable production scale with economies that support both development and volume supply.

strengths.title: Broad Product Portfolio
strengths.description: Knits, coated fabrics, 3D spacer, raised, FR fabrics — covering diverse industrial needs.

strengths.title: Zero Discharge & Waterless Finishing
strengths.description: A strong sustainability profile aligned with European and North American market expectations.

strengths.title: Interplast Kimya Partnership
strengths.description: Access to PU resins and lacquers for vertical integration and higher-value coated solutions.

strengths.title: Innovation in Coated 3D Fabrics
strengths.description: With years of R&D we have managed to achieve 3D spacer fabrics available in a wide range of thicknesses starting from 1mm all the way to 3.5mm and above.

strengths.title: Fast Delivery & Customization
strengths.description: Responsive manufacturing and custom development as key competitive advantages.

nc.divisionLogoAlt: NirChem - a division of Nirbhay Knitting Industries
nc.divisionStatement: We offer a wide range of Solvent based, Water based and bio based chemicals for various industries including Synthetic Leather, Genuine Leather, and Direct Coating.

processStages.title: Synthetic Leather
processStages.description: Our range of Chemicals includes water based, solvent based and bio-based chemicals across the respective categories: PUs, PVCs, Aliphatics, Aromatics, Polycarbonates.

processStages.title: Genuine Leather
processStages.description: We offer waterbased finishing PUs for genuine leather in various finishes like gloss and matt.

processStages.title: Direct Coating
processStages.description: Chemicals and systems for direct coating applications across various industrial end-uses.

products.name: Synthetic Leather Chemicals
products.description: Our range of Chemicals includes water based, solvent based and bio-based chemicals across the respective categories: PUs, PVCs, Aliphatics, Aromatics, Polycarbonates.

products.name: Genuine Leather Chemicals
products.description: We offer waterbased finishing PUs for genuine leather in various finishes like gloss and matt.

products.name: Direct Coating Chemicals

innovation.title: Bio-based and Water-based PU Systems
innovation.description: In NirChem, by the introduction of water-based and bio-based PUs, we pledge our support to initiatives like the CBE JU of the European Union, promoting the use of bio-based PUs.
innovation.detail: Our commitment to sustainable chemistry drives the development of water-based and bio-based polyurethane systems that reduce environmental impact while maintaining performance across synthetic leather, genuine leather, and direct coating applications.

partnership.title: Strategic Partnership with ANEX by Interplast
partnership.description: We are the certified agents for Interplast Kimya, based out of Istanbul Turkey, specialising in chemicals for different types of coating. Our strategic partnership with ANEX by Interplast strengthens our position as a comprehensive chemicals solutions provider.

contentBlock.title: Your partner in coating chemicals
contentBlock.description: NirChem offers a wide range of Solvent based, Water based and bio based chemicals for various industries including Synthetic Leather, Genuine Leather, and Direct Coating. As certified agents for Interplast Kimya, we bring world-class chemical solutions to our diverse clientele.

banner.title: Sustainability
banner.subtitle: Growth is irrelevant without sustainability
banner.description: We at Nirbhay, believe that growth is irrelevant without sustainability and hence we have consciously taken steps to ensure that we do as much as we can for the environment.

intro.title: Our commitment to the environment
paragraphs: We at Nirbhay, believe that growth is irrelevant without sustainability and hence we have consciously taken steps to ensure that we do as much as we can for the environment.
The first step was to ensure that no water is used in manufacturing and processing any of our fabrics. This makes us a ZERO DISCHARGE COMPANY.

pillars.title: Zero Discharge Company
pillars.description: The first step was to ensure that no water is used in manufacturing and processing any of our fabrics. This makes us a ZERO DISCHARGE COMPANY.

pillars.title: Green Space
pillars.description: At our manufacturing facility in Halol, Gujarat, we have maintained acres of green space to contribute to a healthier environment.

pillars.title: Clean Energy Sources
pillars.description: We only use electricity and gas as our sources of energy.

pillars.title: Bio-based PUs via NirChem
pillars.description: In NirChem, by the introduction of water-based and bio-based PUs, we pledge our support to initiatives like the CBE JU of the European Union, promoting the use of bio-based PUs.

leadership.bio: From substrate development and coating trials to production follow-through and customer coordination, the broader team helps translate industrial requirements into practical, tested manufacturing outcomes.
